title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude AI was used in partnership with the Atlassian Williams F1 Team to visualize driver and team cognitive patterns during racing. The "Pattern of Thought" project converts biometric and decision-making signals into real-time visual displays on helmets, race suits, and garage equipment for the Monaco Grand Prix.
